headline: Can FactSet (FDS) Sustain Its Dividend Advantage Without Shifting Its Quality-First Playbook?
summary: In its recently reported Q2 2026 results, FactSet Research Systems delivered revenue and adjusted EPS that exceeded Wall Street estimates, reinforcing its profile as a consistently growing dividend payer with a payout ratio that remains comparatively low. This combination of stronger-than-expected earnings and a dividend yield above both industry and S&P 500 averages highlights FactSet’s appeal for investors focused on income and quality. Next, we’ll examine how FactSet’s Q2 earnings beat,...
